menu.delete_account_desc: All your data will be permanently deleted. Are you sure?

notifications.welcome_body_static: This is a new beginning for you! Believe in your inner strength, everything will be fine.
notifications.welcome_body: It's great to have you with us. I'll share something interesting with you shortly.
notifications.teaser_title: I have something to tell you... ✨
notifications.test_body: We've prepared a special analysis for you.
notifications.test_body_short: We've prepared a new analysis for you.
notifications.preparing_test: AI is preparing a test for you...
notifications.empty: You don't have any notifications yet.

dynamic_test.title: Surprise Weekly Test
dynamic_test.error_loading: Could not load the test. Please try again.

register.title: Registration
register.password_min_length: Password must be at least 6 characters

journal.saved_body: You can discuss this note with your AI psychologist during the session.
journal.footer_info: Everything you write is completely confidential.

therapy_prep.title: Let's prepare for your session
therapy_prep.subtitle: This will help me understand you better and provide more personalized support

chat_style_section.title: How would you like me to talk with you?

assessment.title: How do you feel today? What brought you to me?

questions.text: I often feel worried or anxious.
I feel sad or hopeless most of the time.
I have a hard time relaxing.
I am often overly critical of myself.
I am not interested in things I used to enjoy.
I feel overwhelmed by my daily tasks.
I feel alone even when I am with others.
I feel my problems are too big to solve.

alerts.user_error_body: User not found. Please log in again.

ai_wait.title: Your personalized analysis
ai_wait.subtitle: Please wait while I review your information
ai_wait.subtitle_with_name: Please wait, I'm reviewing your information, {{name}}.
ai_wait.notification_body: Tap to view your personalized introduction.

ai_intro.positive_diagnosis: Your test results show a positive mental state. You're doing well.
ai_intro.neutral_diagnosis: Based on your answers, your emotional state is in a neutral range.
ai_intro.negative_diagnosis: Your test results indicate that you may be going through a challenging period. You are not alone.
ai_intro.instruction_to_chat: You can start the chat now. I am ready to listen and help.

chat.title: Live Session
chat.offer_test: I recommend a short test now.

login.login_failed: The email or password you entered is incorrect.
